creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #1)

(...)

Which leeds to build fail since port doesn't found WRKSRC:

=> SHA256 Checksum OK for pnu-portstreelint-1.4.2.tar.gz.
===>  Missing license file for BSD3CLAUSE in ports-mgmt/py-pnu-portstreelint/work-py39/pnu-portstreelint-1.4.2/License

Where is expected to be found at work-py39/pnu-portstreelint-1.4.2/ and not work-py39/pnu_portstreelint-1.4.2/
